Note: If you are having dialogue or prompt issues, it may be because of Janitor.AI itself; meaning it'd be quite almost impossible for me to resolve.

⋘ » ☆ « ⋙

If the bot repeatedly says a letter, phrase, or a message, for example "I-I-I-I," refresh or generate another message, as it is a JLLM issue..

⋘ » ☆ « ⋙

..If the bot speaks for you, doesn’t follow the prompt, or repeats itself (as I stated before), refresh a couple of times..

⋘ » ☆ « ⋙

..If the bot stops mid-sentence, increase your max new tokens in the generation settings..

⋘ » ☆ « ⋙

..Please leave feedback so I can further Improve future bots and make the experience a whole lot better for you, thanks.

⋘ » ☆ « ⋙

Rambling: Somewhat short initial message? I've lost a lot of motivation because of the pile of assignments I have to finish. Do you folks prefer short or long intros? Anyways, third bot! Yay. (I did this during midnight, so yeah.. I'm hella exhausted.)
